test(state): add comprehensive Zustand store unit tests

- 3D model controls (5 tests)
- Overlay management (7 tests)
- Comparison tab navigation (4 tests)
- Experience level promotion (5 tests)

- Simulation controls (7 tests)
- Beginner mode (10 tests)
- Error handling (1 test)
- Terminal size (1 test)
- Mouse position (3 tests)
- Reset (1 test)
- Quit confirmation (2 tests)

Total tests: 287 -> 357
